doctorPage.title: Physio Care - Advanced Physiotherapy Clinic
doctorPage.about: Welcome to Physio Care. We are dedicated to providing the highest quality of physiotherapy in Crossings Republik. Our expert team focuses on relieving pain, restoring function, and preventing future injuries.

services.title: Pain Management
services.description: Effective therapies to manage and alleviate chronic pain.

services.title: Sports Injury
services.description: Specialized treatments for athletes to recover quickly and safely.

services.title: Post-Surgery Rehab
services.description: Comprehensive programs to help you bounce back after surgery.

playZonePage.title: Lets Play Zone - Kids Play Area & Game Zone
playZonePage.about: Childhood is meant for playing as much as you can. Lets Play Zone is the happy place for your little ones to explore their fantasy world. We offer ample space with 30+ games, an attached cafe, and hygienic environment.

services.title: Birthday Parties
services.description: Premium packages to make your child's birthday truly special.

services.title: Arcade Games
services.description: A wide variety of arcade games for kids and adults alike.

services.title: Skill-building Workshops
services.description: Activities like arts, crafts, singing, and storytelling.
